title: Lycopodioides distorta
taxonomy: Lycopodioides distorta is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. It belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida and the division Lycopodiophyta, indicating its classification as a vascular plant. The kingdom to which Lycopodioides distorta belongs is Plantae, comprising all flowering plants, conifers, and other vascular plants. Its classification is further grouped under the phylum Tracheophyta, which includes all vascular plants. Lycopodioides distorta is also classified under the type of plant known as a lycopod, which is a group of vascular plants characterized by their simple, branching stems.
